note: No actual secrets were found in this audit. This register documents the redaction surfaces where secrets COULD be exposed, and the current redaction status.

secret_surfaces.exposure_risk: Error messages may contain file content with secrets
Tool responses may include file contents or scan results with secrets
secret_surfaces.current_redaction: None (relies on lode-core output already being clean)
secret_surfaces.recommendation: Apply redact_secrets() at MCP response boundary

secret_surfaces.exposure_risk: LSP diagnostics send secret finding details to editor
secret_surfaces.recommendation: Add config flag to redact details; default to redacted

secret_surfaces.exposure_risk: Error output from commands may contain sensitive content
secret_surfaces.recommendation: Apply redact_secrets() at CLI output boundary

secret_surfaces.exposure_risk: Log statements may capture sensitive data for debugging
secret_surfaces.current_redaction: Policy exists (AGENTS.md) but no code enforcement
secret_surfaces.recommendation: Implement centralized redact_secrets() and enforce in logging pipeline

secret_surfaces.exposure_risk: .env files are skipped by scanner, may contain real secrets not detected
secret_surfaces.recommendation: Document that .env files are excluded from scanning
